name: CMS: Sensitive Data Only With Compliant Tool
description: PHI / sensitive PII and other sensitive data are used only with AI tools that meet HHS/CMS cybersecurity & privacy standards.
rationale: CMS BR-AI-1: sensitive data (PHI, SPII, etc.) may only be used with AI tools and services that meet HHS and CMS cybersecurity standards.

examples.passes: the CMS AI rule's evidence is present

source: CMS Technical Reference Architecture (TRA) — Artificial Intelligence Guidance (Business Rules BR-AI-1..6 and recommended practices; references OMB M-25-21/M-25-22, NIST AI RMF, HHS AI policy). https://www.cms.gov/tra/Foundation/FD_0080_Foundation_AI_Guidance.htm
